text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Kikuka Sho arrives, and I'm sitting
here mulling over a disagreement Tamamo Cross
and I had before we decided to join this race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Didja know 'bout this, Trainer? Guess what the
media's callin' me?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Why would I point that out?! No! They're callin'
me the "Secret Weapon of Ritto!"

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Guess the people're finally gettin' wise to
my greatness. And that's not all.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Next year will be when she truly toughens up.
That's why it's better that she doesn't run in the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Well, it should! Why do I gotta be a secret weapon?! I wanna be a not-so-secret weapon!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's why we gotta give 'em a taste of my
talents.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Even if I am gonna get real strong next year,
there's no time like the present! The last crown of
the Triple Crown is mine for the takin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Brimming with confidence, Tamamo Cross puts
herself down for the Kikuka Sho. Meanwhile...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
The color most befitting the chrysanthemum
season...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It would have to be... gold. Yeah, that one pops
the most.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'll make the rest of the competition look like
accent colors at best. After all, I'm the star of this
show!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the 3,000-meter Kyoto racecourse, early and
late bloomers alike get ready to clash over the
final crown.
